payload.label: window
payload.long_description: Large dark reflective window pane filling most of the crop, showing interior reflections including a lit table lamp and a faint human silhouette; glass surface has horizontal light flare and visible smudges, outer frame is irregular and partly cropped at the image edges — approximately 1.0 m from the camera.

message.content: {"label":"window","short_description":"dark reflective window with lamp","long_description":"Large dark reflective window pane filling most of the crop, showing interior reflections including a lit table lamp and a faint human silhouette; glass surface has horizontal light flare and visible smudges, outer frame is irregular and partly cropped at the image edges — approximately 1.0 m from the camera.","attributes":["dark reflective glass","table lamp reflection","faint human silhouette reflection","horizontal light flare","smudges/streaks on glass","irregular/frame edges","partially cropped"],"distance_from_camera_m":1.0}
